scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/robloxstudio-mcp && npm run build -w packages/robloxstudio-mcp-inspector
scripts.compile:plugin: npm --prefix studio-plugin ci && npm --prefix studio-plugin run build
scripts.build:plugin:inspector: npm run compile:plugin && node scripts/build-plugin.mjs --variant inspector
scripts.build:plugins: npm run compile:plugin && node scripts/build-plugin.mjs && node scripts/build-plugin.mjs --variant inspector
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:plugins
scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/core && tsx packages/robloxstudio-mcp/src/index.ts
scripts.test:fault-injection:10k: npm run build -w packages/core && node scripts/fault-injection-benchmark.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:all && npm run docs:check && npm run test:plugin:smoke && npm run test:plugin:runtime && npm run verify-package
